title: Workforms - Appointment picker widget
excerpt: We would love to have an appointment picker widget in Workforms with time slots.

posts.author: Kiwiana77 (Zayne)
posts.cookedHtml:
We would love to have an appointment picker widget in Workforms with time slots.

image734×406 27.9 KB

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Kiwiana77

Just out of curiosity: where did you get this image from? Is that React component? Love the layout.

posts.author: Kiwiana77 (Zayne)
posts.cookedHtml: It is from the JotForm.com which we are currently using and integrate with Monday. It called “Appointment Picker” . It amazing layout and option and i think only Jotform offers such widget in their forms. We are currently using it > when client complete the form + book an appointment (on the same form : then it sends the date/time to Monday date and time column > Monday automation create an event in outlook calendar. It help to minimize the process of asking the client to register > then send them another link to book an appointment > then they book an appointment. Its a long process. Thats we have decided to use Jotform instead of WorkForms

posts.author: DanielleA (Danielle Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml: This seems like a HUGE opportunity for Monday to prioritize - the ability to show available appointment times… @basdebruin , I hope this is a high priority! I am having to do a work-intensive work around using Monday for this type of process.
